paragraphs: Enjoying Starbucks is now easier than ever. Discover if delivery is available in your area. Order now from Starbucks and enjoy your favorite beverages and food.

partners.title: Our Delivery Partners
partners.subtitle: Starbucks delivery is available via Talabat
paragraphs: Enjoy your favorite Starbucks drink with delivery via Talabat. Order now and get everything you love from Starbucks wherever you are.

how-it-works.title: How to Order
how-it-works.subtitle: Simple steps to get your coffee
paragraphs: Getting Starbucks delivered to your home or office is simple. Just follow these steps to get started.
list: Open the Talabat app or website.
Search for 'Starbucks' in the search engine.
Select your favorite beverages and food.
Confirm your order and wait for it to arrive.

items.title: How do I get Starbucks delivery?
items.content: Easily order through the Talabat app.

items.title: Can all items on the Starbucks menu be ordered for delivery?
items.content: To maintain high quality standards and service levels, we have a specific delivery menu. Therefore, some select food and beverage items are currently not available for delivery.

items.title: Can I pay using a Starbucks card or the Starbucks app for delivery?
items.content: Please note that payment via Starbucks card or the app is currently unavailable for delivery orders. Please pay through the Talabat app when ordering.
